title: Zombie Modpack
description: This pack combines intense zombie survival with a massively expanded world, featuring new biomes, structures, and challenges that transform Minecraft into a true post-apocalyptic adventure.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c5dc260436443998607260355ffe4b0ad81cfa9.png)Welcome to the Zombie modpack — a world where the wild has taken over, the dead roam freely, and every day is a fight to stay alive.
This pack combines intense zombie survival with a massively expanded world, featuring new biomes, structures, and challenges that transform Minecraft into a true post-apocalyptic adventure.

🔥 Features:

🧟 Hordes of zombies with smarter AI and special variants

🌍 Dozens of new biomes, dungeons, and natural structures

⚔️ Survival-focused gameplay: scavenging, crafting, and defending

🌅 Dynamic weather, immersive sounds, and atmospheric visuals

🪓 Balanced performance with optimization mods
